name: Documentation-as-Code Platform
description: A workflow pipeline that generates, validates, and deploys engineering documentation from markdown repositories automatically.
architecture: Markdown source files are committed to Git -> Validated by Python scripts (link checking & spelling) -> Transformed by static site generator -> Deployed to secure server via Bamboo CI.
lessons: Managing internal links across hundreds of documentation pages is hard. We solved it by building a custom dependency-graph generator in Python that runs on every commit.

name: AI Documentation Assistant
description: An LLM-backed helper tool that reviews code diffs and writes update drafts for system architecture documents.
architecture: Git pull request hook triggers Python script -> Python extracts diff and sends to OpenAI/Anthropic API with custom system prompts -> Generates markdown diff -> Appends suggested changes to PR comments.
lessons: Large code diffs can hit token limit restrictions and cause hallucinatory suggestions. We implemented chunking and AST-based filter methods to only feed relevant changes to the model.

name: PR Review Automation System
description: A self-hosted service that runs static security scans and code style audits on Bitbucket pull requests using lightweight Webhooks.
architecture: Bitbucket Webhook -> Python Flask listener -> Executes custom SonarQube quality gate API calls -> Posts feedback reports directly back into Bitbucket as review comments.
lessons: Webhook traffic spikes can overload single threads. We migrated the system to run on a lightweight celery task worker pattern, resolving reliability bottlenecks.

name: Raspberry Pi Home Server Lab
description: A self-hosted home server infrastructure cluster for managing backups, local media streaming, and private DNS servers.
architecture: Raspberry Pi 4 running Ubuntu Server -> Docker Compose orchestrating Pi-hole (DNS filter), Plex (Media Server), Samba (Backups), and Nginx (Reverse Proxy).
lessons: SD cards wear out quickly under persistent write operations. Moving the root operating system mount and cache directories to a solid-state drive (SSD) over USB 3.0 drastically improved speed and durability.

name: CI/CD Automation Toolkit
description: A reusable library of PowerShell modules and Dockerized templates for bootstrapping new deployment pipelines fast.
architecture: Modular PowerShell script libraries -> Published as JFrog Artifactory modules -> Loaded into Bamboo and Azure DevOps build pipelines to standardise build steps.
lessons: Writing cross-platform scripts (Windows PowerShell vs PowerShell Core on Linux) requires careful handling of path separators and environmental variables. We instituted a strict linting process using PSScriptAnalyzer.

name: Knowledge Base Generator
description: A tool that parses engineering repositories and generates structured searchable directories of architectural designs.
architecture: Local directory scanner -> Parses metadata in markdown front-matter -> Outputs static searchable HTML index with custom design elements.
lessons: Writing client-side JS search with low memory footprint was key. We implemented a lightweight fuzzy string search index in vanilla JavaScript that works on client-side JSON files directly.
